title: AMZCHEF Blender Smoothie Maker - 2000W Commercial Blender with 2L BPA Free Container - 25000RPM High Speed blender with 8 Speeds Control for kitchen - 4 Presets for Ice/Juice/Smoothie/Nuts
features: ✔🍎【POWERFUL & EFFICIENT BLENDER】AMZCHEF blender smoothie maker equipped with a 2000W motor and 8 sharp stainless steel blades that rotate at up to 25,000 RPM for efficient cutting, food can be completely mashed in seconds! Blender can rupture up to 90% or more of cell walls, maximising the extraction of nutrients and vitamins, the powerful blender for the elderly and young. Perfect for fruit and vegetables, handmade nut butter, frozen dessert, baby food and more.

✔🍎【8 SPEEDS CONTROL & 4 PRESETS】 The commercial blender equipped with 8 variable speed control and 4 pre-programmed settings (Juice/Grind/Ice crushing/Smoothie) allows to refine every texture with culinary precision. Blenders for kitchen come with an LCD display that make it easier to know the current speed or use it as a timer. The pulse function in the blender smoothie maker enhances control and precision for perfect blending. Healthy food made smart and easy.

✔🍎【LARGE CAPACITY & QUIET】The 2 litre commercial blender is perfect for making large quantities of cream, smoothies for the whole family. Blender is made of durable, impact-resistant, BPA-free Tritan material. AMZCHEF blender are much quieter than others thanks to their stable base and noise-reducing pads. The non-slip handle and kettle stirring plunger help load ingredients for the smoothest possible mix.

✔🍎【SELF CLEANING & SAFETY】After using the smoothie blender, the jug can be easily cleaned by running it for 30 seconds with some warm water and detergent, avoiding the damage of hand-washing the inside of jug. Blender package includes an extra cleaning brush for better stain removal, all ACCESSORIES are easy to clean. There is a safety lock on the base that stops the blender from working when the body and jug are separated.

✔🍎【PREMIUM-SERVICE】Blender smoothie maker includes a user manual and a recipe for you to better use it. For Amazon customers, AMZCHEF blender offers permanent technical support and a 24-hour PREMIUM SERVICE. If you have any problems with the smoothie blender, please contact us first. We will offer you the satisfactory solution as soon as possible.
description: Product Description The AMZCHEF Smoothie Blender Maker is a professional, multi-functional, high-speed blender for home and commercial use. Check out our AMZCHEF 2000W powerful blender ice crusher! This smoothie blender is equipped with a 2000W motor and 8 sharp stainless steel blades that rotate at a speed of up to 25,000 RPM. With high cutting efficiency, food can be completely mashed in seconds, and its cell wall rupture rate is more than 90%, which maximises nutrients and vitamins extracted from the food, making it the best blender for the elderly and children. Great for fruit and vegetable juices, nuts, milkshakes, smoothies, frozen desserts, baby food and more. Also equipped with 8 variable speed controls and 4 pre-programmed settings (Juice/Grind/Ice Crush/Smoothie), this professional blender smoothie maker allows you to refine each texture with culinary precision. With an LCD display, you can more easily see the current speed or use it as a timer. Built-in pulse function for added control and precision for perfect blending. Healthy food made smart and easy. Professional Blender Smoothie Maker Recipe Book AMZCHEF 2000W blender ontains a recipe book with 45 ideas for smoothies, drinks, desserts, sauces, butter, cocktails, milkshakes and much more. You can learn many new and useful tips about healthy eating and drinking.
